input: Refactor backend API route to classify retryable and non-retryable failures and keep idempotency in worker queue.
Implement DLQ strategy with dead-letter routing and safe requeue policy for transient errors.
Explain how to reduce prompt token usage while preserving semantic fidelity and output JSON.
Generate code snippet in Rust for parsing webhook payload and validating signature.
Fix flaky tests in CI and improve coverage guard for regression suite.
Implement postgres migration with rollback plan and schema compatibility checks.

Contexto
Temos eventos duplicados no worker
Objetivo
Garantir idempotência e reduzir reprocessamentos sem perder rastreabilidade
Escopo
Ajustar classificação de falhas e política de retry/DLQ
Review API contract changes and ensure backward compatibility with existing clients.
Compress this long meeting transcript into a minimal technical action list with priorities.
Please summarize terminal output and keep only errors, failed tests, and stack traces.
